name: web
title: Web
description: AI-powered web research using local Ollama models. Search, crawl, extract, and get grounded answers.
author: xlr-01

commands.name: ask-web
commands.title: Ask Web
commands.description: Unified interface to chat, research, analyze URLs, and view history.

tools.name: web-search
tools.title: Web Search
tools.description: Search the web and scrape raw page content. Returns deep context. Call this multiple times with different queries if you need more information.

preferences.name: ollamaUrl
preferences.title: Ollama URL
preferences.description: URL of your local Ollama server

preferences.name: defaultModel
preferences.title: Default Model
preferences.description: Default Ollama model to use (e.g., gemma3:4b, llama3.1, mistral)

preferences.name: searxngUrl
preferences.title: SearXNG URL
preferences.description: URL of your local SearXNG instance (optional, falls back to DuckDuckGo)

preferences.name: maxResults
preferences.title: Max Search Results
preferences.description: Maximum number of search results to crawl

preferences.name: maxContentLength
preferences.title: Max Content Length
preferences.description: Maximum characters to extract per page
